creator: h.eichmann@gmx.de
text:
Hi!

Due to the lack of free time I have to drop the maintainership of my ports.

Best regards,


Heiner

Fix: --Boundary-00=_BtrBMpM4sw5GBaZ

--Boundary-00=_BtrBMpM4sw5GBaZ----HTSODWdtXHuAPBHb2wvOxG1svdfwzAVjrTyyACzF5WJKMpEb
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.orig	2010-06-02 22:08:01.000000000 +0200
+++ Makefile	2010-06-02 22:09:09.000000000 +0200
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}-x/${PORTNAME}-090400/${PORTVERSION}
 DISTNAME=	GDialog-090400-25
 
-MAINTAINER=	h.eichmann@gmx.de
+MAINTAINER=	ports@freebsd.org
 COMMENT=	A Project X addon to read Siemens Gigaset M740AV video recordings
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	projectx>=0.90.4.00:${PORTSDIR}/multimedia/projectx
